_meta.verificationNote: Standard 5x5 cyber risk matrix constructed for use with the accompanying methodology and risk register. Risk levels and thresholds are indicative examples for organizational calibration.

title: Cyber Risk Assessment Matrix
description: 5x5 risk matrix mapping likelihood and impact to risk levels. Used for both inherent risk (before controls) and residual risk (after controls) assessment.

riskLevels.action: Immediate executive escalation. Risk must be treated within 30 days or formally accepted by the board.
riskLevels.reportingFrequency: Weekly to CISO, monthly to board

riskLevels.action: Treatment plan required within 60 days. Risk owner must document rationale if accepting.
riskLevels.reportingFrequency: Bi-weekly to CISO, quarterly to board

riskLevels.action: Treatment plan required within 90 days. Monitor through standard risk review cycle.
Accept or treat at discretion of risk owner. Review during quarterly cycle.
Accept. No active treatment required. Include in annual reassessment.

matrix.description: Risk score = Likelihood x Impact. Rows are likelihood (top = highest), columns are impact (left = lowest).

riskAppetiteThresholds.description: Organizational risk appetite thresholds defining which residual risk levels require treatment.

thresholds.action: Must be treated or escalated to board for explicit acceptance
Treatment plan required, risk owner accountability
Treatment recommended, acceptance by risk committee permitted
Within risk appetite, monitor through standard review
